calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Admitted Defendant Jake Robert Reiss Requests For Admission, Set One, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan M. Sanders, of Law Offices of Leach & McGreevy LLP, Tel. 415.775.4455, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: DEFENDANT JAKE REIS Motion To Deem Admitted Defendant Jake Robert Reiss Requests For Admission, Set One, And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Monetary Sanctions in the amount of $1,110. are awarded to defendant Jake Robert Reis and against plaintiff Markel Service Incorporated and its attorney of record. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Mark LeHocky; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
